sub_modules.aes_subbytes: Applies the AES S-box to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Performs AES MixColumns using GF(2^8) arithmetic.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand_round: Computes one AES-128 round key from the previous round key.
sub_modules.aes_round: Combines key expansion, SubBytes, ShiftRows, optional MixColumns, and AddRoundKey for one encryption round.
